response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with over 12 years in diverse roles, including leadership positions. His expertise spans multiple programming languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Kotlin/Java, D, C/C++), frameworks (React, Nest.js, Ember.js, Vitest), and cloud technologies (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes). His involvement in AI-agent infrastructure, real-time systems, and scalable platforms aligns well with the role's requirements. While his primary stack is not exclusively the requested one, his adaptability and problem-solving skills are evident.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack requirements
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure, scalability, and performance optimization, aligning with secondary and emerging technology needs
Strong leadership and mentorship background, with contributions to open-source projects, workshops, and team development processes
concerns: Primary experience includes D and Ember.js, which are not part of the requested stack, though adaptability is demonstrated
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest in recent roles, though TypeScript and testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest) are referenced
No direct experience with PostgreSQL or MySQL mentioned in recent roles, though SQL and MongoDB are listed as skills

key_factors.factor: Diversity of tech stack beyond primary requirements
